name: Papaya Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red Chile; seed, finely chopped
1 Papaya; peel and cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion, bell pepper, and chile in oil over medium heat, stirring frequently until tender.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours. Makes 3 cups of relish.
